subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that He, verily, is none other than He, and there is no God but Him. And He Who speaketh with truth is indeed the Ocean of My Will and the heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه هو هو و لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه لبحر مشیتی و سماء
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @prophecy and fulfillment, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
